About Me

Hello! I’m Dheeraj Maske, a graduate student at New York University, studying Engineering Management - Product Development, Design and Strategy & Cryptonetworks .

I write blogs that simplify complex ideas by answering the fundamentals—why, how, what, when, and where—while covering technology, trends, and real-world applications.

  • Previously Interned At:
    • Narravance Summer’25 (Backend Developer - Backtesting Trading Strategy tool)
    • Nethermind Summer’24 (Research & Development- Shipped Augit Agent)
    • ISRO Summer’23 (Cryptography Researcher - ECC and RSA )
    • Tata Research, Design and Development Centre Fall’23
    • IIT-Bombay (Apprenticeship Program)
    • Bitquery Spring and Summer’24 (Technical Writing- API)
  • Feel free to connect with me on Twitter & LinkedIn.
  • Reach out to me via email: [firstname][lastname]2001[at]gmail[dot]com.

    This website’s design was inspired by Chris Dixon’s blog.
